block_reason: Spec contradiction: requires offline-only operation but also requires cloud-only model access.
evidence: Task says: 'no data leaves device' but also says: 'use model X cloud API'.
what_was_tried: Attempted redaction-only approach; still violates offline requirement.

spec_change_options.option: Allow cloud model usage for non-sensitive data only
spec_change_options.impact: Define what data is allowed to leave the device.

spec_change_options.option: Use local-only models for sensitive pipeline
spec_change_options.impact: Requires GPU/quantized models or external local server.
